title: Awards & Certifications
content: Land Trades Builders & Developers holds CRISIL DA2 Real Estate Developer Rating, valid till August 11, 2026.

title: Awards & Certifications
content: Land Trades is ISO 9001:2015 certified by Bureau Veritas Certification.

title: Awards & Certifications
content: Land Trades is a member of the Indian Green Building Council (IGBC).

title: Awards & Certifications
content: Land Trades received the UltraTech Award in 2013 for excellence.
